name: Stop button
goal: Emit a stop-generation intent for chat surfaces — the counterpart to ce-retry-button for mid-stream cancellation.
description: Compact button rendered in three styled variants (primary/secondary/ghost). Default content is a stop-square SVG plus the label, both replaceable via the default slot. Emits a bubbling, composed ce-chat-stop CustomEvent on click or Enter/Space — no event fired when disabled.

props.name: label
props.description: Visible label when no slotted content is provided.

props.name: variant
props.description: Visual variant; styling is driven via :host([variant=…]) selectors.

props.name: disabled
props.description: Disables the button; the ce-chat-stop event is NOT fired when disabled.

events.name: ce-chat-stop
events.description: Fired on click or Enter/Space when the button is focused. Not fired when disabled. Hosts use this as the stop-generation signal.

slots.description: Optional override for the icon + label content.

cssVariables.name: --ce-text
cssVariables.description: Default label color and ghost variant color.

cssVariables.name: --ce-color-red
cssVariables.description: Primary variant text color and hover border color.

cssVariables.name: --ce-transition-fast
cssVariables.description: Hover transition timing for background and border-color.

a11y.notes: Native <button> element; the SVG is aria-hidden so the label text drives the accessible name. Keyboard activation (Enter/Space) is handled on the inner button's keydown event.
